title: Live results: Abbott, Hinojosa compete in Texas gubernatorial primaries
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Texas Gov. Greg Abbott (R) is the clear frontrunner in Tuesday’s Republican gubernatorial primary, with state Rep. Gina Hinojosa leading the contest across the aisle. The Lone Start State’s gubernatorial state is likely to stay in the GOP’s hands in November. Follow Decision Desk HQ’s live results here. “” “”
